components.text:
$(b)Body Physique$(/b)
This allows you to cultivate your Body!
$(b)Intent Physique$(/b)
This allows you to cultivate your Mind!
$(b)Essence Physique$(/b)
This allows you to cultivate the normal way!

Do Note! Even if you got Body, Intent or Essence Physique you can still Cultivate!

So yes you can cultivate all paths at the same time, you just wont get as strong with the other 2 paths as with the one matching your Physique! 
It just wont be as effective as cultivating same type as your physique! 

Physiques also give Skills!

Physiques are what allows you to cultivate! Without one it's not possible. 
Fortunatly for you we provide you one when you first join a world! As you remember you got to choose between Body, Intent or Essence.
And it will give you a random physique inside that Cultivation Path.

How do I change my Physique? 

Currently the only way at the moment to get a new Physique is to use the $(b)$(el:pills/rebirthpill)Rebirth Pill$(/el)$(/b)! 
Fortunatly for you we are implementing a way to magically change your physique for a better one in the future!
